channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: A16z sides with CFTC against states seeking to ban prediction markets
item.description: Venture capital firm a16z argues that state crackdowns on platforms like Kalshi and Polymarket conflict with federal law and hurt market access for ordinary users.

item.title: OpenClaw Put Apple Back in the AI Game—And Now They Can't Build Macs Fast Enough
item.description: The Mac mini went from a $599 desktop nobody cared about to the hottest piece of AI hardware on the planet. One open-source agent framework did it.

item.title: The $292M crypto hack exposed DeFi's weak spots. Here’s what must change, insiders say
item.description: As Wall Street moves onchain, the year's biggest crypto hack and DeFi crisis is forcing a rethink of risk, security and market structure, industry insiders told CoinDesk.

item.title: Prediction markets are ditching the 'casino' label to become a regular part of how people track the news
item.description: A new report from Bitget and Polymarket reveals that prediction markets are evolving into a $240 billion industry driven by retail users who are trading more frequently on everything from crypto to politics.

item.title: Riot posts $167M in Q1 revenue as data center arm pulls in $33M in first quarter
item.description: Riot Platforms reported $167.2 million in Q1 2026 revenue, with its new data center business contributing $33.2 million as Bitcoin mining income fell.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation sells another 10,000 ETH to BitMine in third OTC deal
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation has now sold roughly $47 million worth of ETH to BitMine in a week, drawing fresh criticism over the pace and scale of its sales.

item.title: Bitcoin above $78,000 as Senate clears Clarity Act yield hurdle, S&P 500 sets new record
item.description: Bitcoin recovered from a midweek dip to $75,500 to climb back above $78,000 by Saturday morning in Asia, with the Senate's stablecoin yield compromise removing a key roadblock to crypto market structure legislation.

item.title: New Bitcoin quantum proposal offers Satoshi Nakamoto a way to prove control without moving BTC
item.description: A new design proposed by venture fund Paradigm would let holders privately timestamp proof that they control vulnerable keys before quantum computers arrive, creating a possible rescue path if Bitcoin ever sunsets old addresses.

item.title: Bitcoin doesn’t need a fresh narrative to reclaim $100K: Analyst
item.description: With attention spilling into multiple other technology sectors, crypto may struggle to capture a strong, price-driving narrative, a crypto analyst says.

item.title: a16z crypto: Why 'stablecoins' won't age well According to a16z crypto, the term 'stablecoin' may eventually become outdated. The article argues that stablecoins were first created to reduce the impact of crypto volatility, but stability has now become a baseline - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFAyamJiMVVnZEtuTlFwWG9Zc3BqVVJQekYyZzBDYVVzT0RqLUU0YjZTQUJSa0FiTm9JTkZxVUZRZ3E1cXd1Y0NuaFk4R1h1UTNIdmZvRVUzVk1jVUZPWV9RSklQbw?oc=5" target="_blank">a16z crypto: Why 'stablecoins' w…

item.title: Bitcoin rally extends, yet BTC options price only 25% chance of $84K in May
item.description: Institutional investors and corporate-level Bitcoin accumulation remain the primary drivers of BTC’s price gains, despite the lack of bullish leverage.

item.title: CLARITY Act stablecoin yield rules finalized: ‘Go time’ for crypto bill
item.description: Galaxy Digital head of research Alex Thorn expects the banking industry to “increase their opposition efforts” following the release of the final stablecoin yield provisions.

item.title: Soldøgn Interop Recap ☀️
item.description: This past week, just over 100 Ethereum core contributors gathered above the Arctic Circle — in Longyearbyen, Svalbard — for the Soldøgn Interop: a week of intense work on the Glamsterdam network upgrade. Soldøgn followed last year's Berlin…

item.title: Clarity Act text lets crypto firms offer stablecoin rewards while shielding bank yield
item.description: The text released Friday blocks crypto firms from offering stablecoin yield offerings that look like bank deposits, but "bona fide" transactions are allowed.

item.title: The final rewards text in the CLARITY Act is now public. We’ve been clear throughout this process: much of this debate was based on imagined risks, not real evidence, nor was it based on a real understanding of how crypto actually works. Nevertheless, the cr - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1jY014OXdFLXJXcnFsVkEyM25qdE10U0hIUUxQMFl6bmZUelFIVjNDOFhKeS1SZ2hUM1FmX3NFdm84Nzg1MkRrVEszT21aTWdhejVveEwxOGt4V0otMWRZS25BOG8?oc=5" target="_blank">The final rewards text in the C…

item.title: Minnesota Moves to Ban AI Apps That Generate Fake Nude Images
item.description: The bill, which bans AI tools that generate fake nudity and lets victims sue their creators, will go to Governor Walz for his signature.

item.title: Three Bitcoin data points suggest a rally to $80K is imminent
item.description: Bitcoin chases $80,000 as rising spot volumes and futures open interest suggest the market has shifted back in the bulls’ favor.

item.title: Bitcoin miner Riot's shares jump 8% after expanding AMD data center deal, signaling AI pivot
item.description: AMD’s expansion and improved financing terms highlight Riot’s shift beyond bitcoin mining and strengthen confidence in its growing data center business.

item.title: XRP sentiment hits 2-year high, but why is price stuck?
item.description: XRP social media sentiment has turned bullish following integration with Rakuten Wallet, but resistance at $1.40 could cap the upside.

item.title: Price predictions 5/1: BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, BCH, XMR
item.description: Technical charts suggest that Bitcoin’s rally continuation is fully dependent on bulls securing a weekly close above $75,000.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation Sells $23 Million More in ETH to Tom Lee's BitMine
item.description: For the second straight week, the Ethereum Foundation has unloaded 10,000 ETH—about $23 million worth—to top treasury firm, BitMine.

item.title: Gency AI raises $20 million to build a sovereign advertising network powered by AI and blockchain consensus
item.description: AI and blockchain infrastructure company Gency AI today announced it has raised $20 million in a new funding round.

item.title: Doctors Use AI to Spot 'Hidden' Sperm In Men
item.description: Columbia University Fertility Center's Star method uses artificial intelligence to detect rare sperm missed in standard tests.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation finalizes sale of 10,000 ether to BitMine as part of its treasury strategy
item.description: The latest transaction follows a similar March deal in which the foundation sold 5,000 ETH to BitMine, raising roughly $10.2 million.

item.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Matches Claude Mythos in Cyberattack Capabilities: AI Security Institute
item.description: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 is the second AI system to complete a simulated corporate network intrusion end-to-end, raising alarms.

item.title: JUST IN: Ethereum Foundation sells 10,000 $ETH worth $23,000,000. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBXYk4xUFJPR3pIamt3Mk9lUkZ1MWtDcXY5YUdVTlBCek9wRDNkQ0Yway1Oc010TWdJNUcwdGtkbzhqVGhTTWlkTDRSYkZtNUh6NGh6Yk5vaVhmOGlsbUVjRWJ3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Ethereum Foundation sells…

item.title: Canadian pension giant AIMCo buys the dip in Strategy, now sitting on $69 million unrealized gain
item.description: AIMCo returns to Michael Saylor's bitcoin treasury company years after exiting, now sitting on a sizable unrealized gain.

item.title: A new narrative for bitcoin that will last
item.description: Of the myriad pundits proclaiming what bitcoin is or isn’t, Blume offers a more clear-eyed framing that, he argues, will outlast the others.

item.title: Pentagon Signs AI Deals With Google, OpenAI, Nvidia, Microsoft, Amazon and SpaceX
item.description: The Department of Defense's agreements will enable AI from the likes of Google and OpenAI to run on top-secret military networks.

item.title: 0/ Today, the Ethereum Foundation finalized the terms of a 10,000 ETH sale at an average price of $2,292.15 via OTC. For this sale, our OTC counterpart was @BitMNR. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE01NXhlbmlhMmlQTm9DMGZWRExYblUyRVlINk5fZFF4a1lmS1dOV0dlSDcwUTFGeWVEelpiaHFSZHNFcENuNzJsVDdzaEtYSzdTajBvRHA1dzBxS09temo3cDlKRQ?oc=5" target="_blank">0/ Today, the Ethereum Foundatio…

item.title: Tether posts $1.04 billion Q1 profit, reaches $8.23 billion reserve buffer
item.description: The stablecoin issuer said the crypto market was highly volatile during the first quarter.

item.title: 🇺🇸 President Trump: '' #Bitcoin and crypto will skyrocket like never before, beyond your expectations.'' - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBfQXgxUmVoYlVWTU1xOVZBUndLWGE1cFAzMnBtT2U2SkZSWGZNOXl1OV91VkswbWFTYmdFUjBoeXoxRDl2N0duRFFOX1pnSk9qNmtWN3VxUFlyVnFPdjItREV3?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 President Trump: '' #Bitcoin …

item.title: Riot Platforms Stock Pops as Bitcoin Miner Reports Data Center Revenue, Doubled AMD Deal
item.description: The Bitcoin mining company's pivot to AI infrastructure hosting generated its first data center revenue as AMD expanded its capacity.

item.title: Crypto Biz: Capital has no consensus
item.description: Crypto markets splinter as miners pivot to AI, BitMine doubles down on ETH, stablecoin liquidity idles, and tokenized Treasurys reshape trading collateral.

item.title: Ethereum ETFs Shed $184M Over 4-Day Negative Streak
item.description: Outflows from Ethereum ETFs extended to a 4-day streak as Bitcoin funds shed $490 million, even as the S&P 500 hit an all-time high.

item.title: AI agent forms its own company, gets ready to trade crypto
item.description: Although Manfred will not start trading crypto until the end of May, it already has a crypto wallet and credentials to hire staff, make payments and do business.

item.title: MoonPay Launches Debit Mastercard That Lets AI Agents Pay With Stablecoins
item.description: MoonPay’s new debit Mastercard lets autonomous AI agents spend stablecoins at any online Mastercard merchant.

item.title: Tether Reports Billion-Dollar Q1 Profit Amid Crypto Slump—And Says Audit Has Begun
item.description: Stablecoin giant Tether says it holds over $141 billion in U.S. Treasuries, a figure that has never been verified by a full audit.

item.title: Bitcoin takes another aim at $80,000 as stocks rise, oil drops on Iran optimism
item.description: The crypto asset rose nearly 3% over the past 24 hours.

item.title: Dogecoin Hits 2-Month High as DOGE Mining Firm Plans to Go Public via Merger
item.description: Nasdaq-listed pharmaceutical company Shuttle pivots to crypto mining in first major institutional play for Dogecoin mining.

item.title: DeFi can freeze stolen funds, but not everyone agrees it should
item.description: Crypto faces backlash for freezing stolen funds and for doing nothing, with expectations pulling in opposite directions.

item.title: Crypto VC funding plunges to $659M in April, hits near two-year low
item.description: Crypto VC funding fell to $659 million in April, its lowest monthly total since July 2024, as dealmaking slowed across the sector.

item.title: Institutional demand to drive bitcoin market cap to $16 trillion by 2030: Ark Invest
item.description: The figure implies a sharp increase in the bitcoin price.

item.title: Senators Warren, Wyden Quiz Commerce Secretary Lutnick Over Tether Loan to Children’s Trust
item.description: The probe follows reports that Dynasty Trust A, which benefits Lutnick’s children, borrowed an undisclosed sum from the stablecoin issuer.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bittensor (TAO) gains 5.5%, leading index higher
item.description: Bitcoin (BTC), up 1.9% from Thursday, was also a top performer.

item.title: Did Dogecoin bottom first? DOGE price poised for 20% gains as whales return
item.description: Dogecoin whale wallets hit record DOGE holdings as the price rallies 23.5%, strengthening the memecoin’s rally chances in May.

item.title: 🚨JUST IN: BRAZIL BANS CRYPTO IN REGULATED CROSS-BORDER PAYMENTS Central Bank of Brazil has prohibited the use of cryptocurrencies in regulated international payments, forcing transfers through traditional FX channels instead. The move targe - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE9maFhjNDZ2TnU5TDU5VlV6N1R0U21xOURSbFNwWVRkM0V2aW5iSlpseEJZR3U5Smh6S3VHZVM2UWxpa192a0xwV2pLLU4tNTJnUUdwVFRQcTgxRG1tWmJZVQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨JUST IN: BRAZIL BANS CRYPTO IN REG…

item.title: Morning Minute: MegaETH's MEGA Debut Biggest of 2026
item.description: MegaETH just debuted the biggest token of 2026 to date, while Kalshi is now officially a top-five U.S. sportsbook.

item.title: Bitcoin Closes April Up 12% as Strategy's MSTR Posts First Positive Month Since July
item.description: Bitcoin rallied 12% in April as Strategy added $4.1 billion in BTC, but on-chain data suggests gains may be speculative.

item.title: Bitcoin bounces as big tech earnings fuel optimism; short-term pressures remain
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 1, 2026

item.title: SBI Holdings eyes stake in crypto exchange Bitbank to build digital asset powerhouse
item.description: The Tokyo-based broker is betting big on crypto with plans in Singapore and a Visa partnership for bank cards that allows users to accumulate digital assets.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs draw $2B in April for highest monthly inflows this year
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs posted strong April inflows as Bitcoin rallied, with IBIT leading gains despite late-month outflows across funds.

item.title: South Korean Court Lifts Bithumb's Six-Month Business Suspension
item.description: A Seoul court has reversed March sanctions that would have restricted the exchange's core functions over alleged compliance failures.

item.title: Bitcoin ticks higher, but remains range-bound as traders keep short bias
item.description: BTC rises to $77,000 after holding $75,000 support, but negative funding, unchanged open interest and cautious positioning signal a lack of conviction.

item.title: Brazil bars crypto settlement in regulated cross-border payment rails
item.description: Brazil’s central bank barred virtual assets from settlement inside regulated eFX payment rails as it tightens oversight of crypto-linked flows.

item.title: SBI eyes Bitbank deal as Japan’s crypto exchange market consolidates
item.description: SBI Holdings is in discussions to make Bitbank a subsidiary, adding to its push to acquire crypto exchanges amid improving regulatory clarity in Japan.

item.title: Bitcoin edges above $77,000, but institutional activity suggests downside hedging
item.description: BTC rises on steady volume and strong technical structure, but surging put interest and muted prediction market odds point to defensive positioning.

item.title: Bitcoin seals best monthly gain in a year as S&P 500 hits fresh all-time high
item.description: Bitcoin finished April above $76,000 to preserve most of its monthly gains, but the S&P 500 stole the limelight with a trip back to record highs.

item.title: Bakkt completes acquisition of stablecoin payments firm Distributed Technologies Research
item.description: Bakkt announced the deal in January, which was originally for 9.3 million shares, along with a corporate name change to Bakkt Inc.
